title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on the economic implications of advanced AI, including optimal taxation strategies, wealth redistribution mechanisms, and whether AI advancement necessarily leads to greater inequality. The discussion challenges intuitive economic assumptions and explores scenarios for how capital share and labor economics might shift in an AGI future.
